title: Photocraft
description: A functional "instant" camera that generates map art of the player's viewpoint
body:
### **Warning**  
#### **This datapack uses experimental features!**  
#### **Please make a backup before adding this pack to an existing world!** 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/AfcoarzWisk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### **Resource Pack Required**
#### To find the relevant resource pack, go to the page for the specific datapack [version](https://modrinth.com/datapack/photocraft-dp/versions) you are trying to install!

# Photocraft Datapack

![Animated comparison of photographed region and resulting photograph](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46cc0f1f3218e1e99e1087b2901571e6f5bace23.gif)  

This datapack adds a camera that can be used to create map-art "photos" of the world.  
There are two items and recipes added to the game - the camera itself, and photo paper.  

You can craft a Camera with 3 Black Carpet, 2 Iron Ingots, 2 Redstone, 1 Spyglass, and 1 Lightning Rod:  
![Crafting Recipe for Camera](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3aea455c1586c4574ff255d9d4e4de3dbf879711.png)

You can craft 4 pieces of Photo Paper with 3 Resin, 3 Paper, 1 Cyan Dye, 1 Yellow Dye, and 1 Magenta Dye:  
![Crafting Recipe for Photo Paper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67390af0ff14a083de57c97b67939ccf3a359a22.png)

To use the camera, click and hold the use-item button. This will pull up a viewfinder that will provide a frame of what will be included in the photo. Releasing the use-item button will place the camera in the world.  
![Example of Viewfinder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66d0b3f55e930c8e495ee793af78f2b3857cac99_0.webp)

To take a photo, click the use-item button on the camera while holding a piece of photo paper. The camera will start emitting smoke particles and the lights on the back of the camera will start turning on, showing photo progress.  
![A Camera generating a photo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb9d8fd093d0f5c3a6c7f1800f631dd64e049930_0.webp)

When the camera is done exposing the photo, the lights on the back will turn green and the camera will play a sound.  
![A camera that is done generating a photo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75240d36ae1292da9aeee9c35cd98a1c8a4c6537.png)

Right click the camera with an empty hand to retrieve the final photo.  
![A finalized photo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17e3a61364318e395e390b66782c2b03e96d12bb.png)

At any point, other than when retrieving a photo, left-clicking the camera will cause it to break, dropping a camera. Any photo that is stored in the camera **will be lost** if it is not retrieved first!
